purpose: Replace the rejected general-in-domain 1M top-up with a disjoint coverage-targeted candidate pool while preserving the validated expansion500K base.

priority_buckets.predicate: S/Cl with low-gap or aromatic-hard signal
rotatable bonds >= 8 with low-gap or aromatic signal
3.2 <= gap < 5.5, 200 <= mw < 500, aromatic rings <= 4, rotatable bonds <= 7

selection_rules: Select no more than 500000 rows after scaffold/fingerprint novelty scoring against expansion500K.
Preserve every validated expansion500K row as the first half of 1M-v2.
Use old:new replay sampling of 2:1 for the first 2D gate; do not use equal sampling.
Do not build 3D graphs unless the single-head 2D gate is non-regressive on PCQM and OOD.
